parameters.query:
INSERT INTO {{ $('Execute: ad_creative').first().json.db_name }}.`MC_ad_creatives` (
  `id`, `name`, `account_id`, `actor_id`, `instagram_user_id`, `instagram_permalink_url`, `effective_instagram_media_id`, `call_to_action_type`, `object_type`, `status`, `thumbnail_url`, `thumbnail_id`, `title`, `video_id`, `image_url`, `body`
) VALUES (
  {{ $json.id }},
  '{{ $json.name }}',
  {{ $json.account_id }},
  {{ $json.actor_id }},
  {{ $json.instagram_user_id }},
  '{{ $json.instagram_permalink_url }}',
  {{ $json.effective_instagram_media_id }},
  '{{ $json.call_to_action_type }}',
  '{{ $json.object_type }}',
  '{{ $json.status }}',
  '{{ $json.thumbnail_url }}',
  {{ $json.thumbnail_id ?? 'NULL' }},
  COALESCE('{{ $json.title ?? '' }}', NULL),
  {{ $json.video_id }},
  COALESCE('{{ $json.image_url ?? '' }}', NULL),
  COALESCE('{{ $json.body }}', NULL)
)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
  `name` = '{{ $json.name }}',
  `account_id` = {{ $json.account_id }},
  `actor_id` = {{ $json.actor_id }},
  `instagram_user_id` = {{ $json.instagram_user_id }},
  `instagram_permalink_url` = '{{ $json.instagram_permalink_url }}',
  `effective_instagram_media_id` = {{ $json.effective_instagram_media_id }},
  `call_to_action_type` = '{{ $json.call_to_action_type }}',
  `object_type` = '{{ $json.object_type }}',
  `status` = '{{ $json.status }}',
  `thumbnail_url` = '{{ $json.thumbnail_url }}',
  `thumbnail_id` = {{ $json.thumbnail_id ?? 'NULL' }},
  `title` = COALESCE('{{ $json.title ?? '' }}', NULL), 
  `video_id` = {{ $json.video_id }},
  `image_url` = COALESCE('{{ $json.image_url ?? '' }}', NULL),
  `body` = COALESCE('{{ $json.body }}', NULL);
